final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section UI mockup for a skincare brand called "LUMEA BEAUTY", feminine Japanese beauty market.

Style/medium: clean flat UI mockup, bright and airy editorial layout, feminine aesthetic with floral accents (purple flowers), soft diffused lighting, Figma/Sketch design presentation style
Composition: full-width desktop landing page hero section, three-column layout — left copy column, center model column, right product column — with a bottom benefit bar; generous white space throughout
Subject: complete hero section mockup with the following structure —

HEADER: logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY" on the left; 5 navigation links reading "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"; CTA button reading "今すぐ試す" on the right

LEFT COLUMN:
• Headline (large display type): "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
• Subheadline (body text): "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
• 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
• 3 bullet points with pink checkmark icons: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
• 2 CTA buttons: primary filled "初回限定で試してみる >" and secondary outline "成分をチェック >"
• Trust badge strip: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"

CENTER COLUMN: photorealistic young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek with one hand, other hand holding a dropper bottle of serum; soft studio lighting; model blends naturally into the page background

RIGHT COLUMN:
• 2 product renders — a moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and its packaging box, clean white background
• 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accent details: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"

BOTTOM SECTION: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"

Scene/backdrop: pure white page background with soft pink and white color palette; scattered subtle purple flower illustrations as decorative accents in corners and around the model
Lighting/mood: soft, even, airy — no harsh shadows; warm-neutral light on model's face; overall mood is fresh, trustworthy, and approachable
Color palette: soft pink as primary brand color, white as base, purple flower accents, gold only on stat card details; typography in near-black for readability
Materials/textures: smooth matte UI surfaces, glossy dropper bottle with subtle specular highlight, soft fabric-like skin texture on model
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; layout must read as a realistic, production-ready desktop landing page mockup; three-column hero grid must be clearly distinguishable; stat cards must appear to float above the product column; pill badges and checkmark bullets must be visually distinct UI components
Avoid: dark backgrounds, neon colors, masculine aesthetic, cluttered layout, lorem ipsum placeholder text, generic stock-photo flatlay, missing navigation elements, distorted Japanese characters
